source.description: Smithsonian Institution Global Volcanism Program (GVP) database of volcanic eruptions worldwide. Contains detailed eruption records with VEI ratings, duration, and impact data.

datasets.events.parquet: Individual eruption events with location, timing, VEI, and impact data

metrics.felt_radius_km: Estimated radius where eruption effects were felt
metrics.deaths: Number of deaths attributed to the eruption
metrics.injuries: Number of injuries attributed to the eruption

geographic_context.focus: Confirmed volcanic eruptions from Holocene to present
admin_levels: Point locations with lat/lon at volcano summit

data_quality_notes: VEI ratings for historical eruptions may be estimated from deposit analysis
Impact data (deaths, damage) primarily available for significant eruptions
earthquake_event_ids and tsunami_event_ids link to related events
noaa_id provides cross-reference to NOAA volcano database
